programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: Old rivalries rear their ugly head when Josh Flagg's teenage client falls for Josh Altman's multi-million dollar listing in the Bird Streets.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry
programme.sub-title: Audrina Patridge, Moby, Austin Mahone, Roselyn Sanchez
programme.desc: Tyler uncovers a disturbing family mystery with reality star Audrina Patridge.

programme.title: Judge Rinder
programme.desc: Arbitration show in which real small-claims cases are adjudicated over within a studio courtroom by Judge Robert Rinder.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: After months in isolation, the friends glam it up for a Beverly Hills barbecue at Dorit's house. Kyle's sister, Kathy Hilton, introduces the group to Crystal Minkoff.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A trip to the hair salon resulted in the plaintiff feeling dreadful about the job done to her hair. But the defendant claims she did exactly what she was asked to do and owes nothing!

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Actor Jude Law; news anchor Tom Llamas & a performance from Just in Time.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Lisa Rinna takes the girls on fun getaway to Lake Tahoe. The excitement only lasts so long, however, as it becomes clear that Sutton and Crystal do not see eye to eye.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: Josh Altman lists a stunning modern home with a $2 million dollar closet, but is left hung out to dry when his client refuses every offer.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Botched
programme.sub-title: Cougars and Cobras and Boobs... Oh My!
programme.desc: Dr Nassif wrangles a cougar's cobra neck; Dr Dubrow helps a desperate patient downsize her triple Ds; Dr Dubrow puts Dr Nassif under the knife.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Fraser begins to question his long distance relationship. Rainbeau tries to connect with Barbara and Solene, and Kyle and Solene go on a date. Chef Anthony struggles with PTSD from last charter season.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of London
programme.desc: As the women prepare for a countryside getaway, Karen reconnects with her Jamaican heritage in Brixton, and Panthea reflects on her family's dramatic past. Later, a helicopter arrival sets the tone fo.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When authorities discover a young woman's body in a shed, they struggle to determine whether her killer is someone under her own roof or the result of an illicit affair.

programme.title: Fatal Family Feuds
programme.desc: The owner of an extreme-sport venture is found shot dead, police suspect a history of bad business may be to blame until a contentious family past begins to cast doubt on his devoted son's innocence.

programme.title: Botched
programme.sub-title: Cougars and Cobras and Boobs... Oh My!
programme.desc: Dr Nassif wrangles a cougar's cobra neck; Dr Dubrow helps a desperate patient downsize her triple Ds; Dr Dubrow puts Dr Nassif under the knife.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Fraser begins to question his long distance relationship. Rainbeau tries to connect with Barbara and Solene, and Kyle and Solene go on a date. Chef Anthony struggles with PTSD from last charter season.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of London
programme.desc: As the women prepare for a countryside getaway, Karen reconnects with her Jamaican heritage in Brixton, and Panthea reflects on her family's dramatic past. Later, a helicopter arrival sets the tone fo.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When authorities discover a young woman's body in a shed, they struggle to determine whether her killer is someone under her own roof or the result of an illicit affair.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Lisa Rinna takes the girls on fun getaway to Lake Tahoe. The excitement only lasts so long, however, as it becomes clear that Sutton and Crystal do not see eye to eye.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A trip to the hair salon resulted in the plaintiff feeling dreadful about the job done to her hair. But the defendant claims she did exactly what she was asked to do and owes nothing!

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: Josh Altman lists a stunning modern home with a $2 million dollar closet, but is left hung out to dry when his client refuses every offer.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Lisa Rinna takes the girls on fun getaway to Lake Tahoe. The excitement only lasts so long, however, as it becomes clear that Sutton and Crystal do not see eye to eye.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: Josh Altman lists a stunning modern home with a $2 million dollar closet, but is left hung out to dry when his client refuses every offer.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry
programme.sub-title: Maria Menounos, Retta, Pia Toscano, Larry Birkhead
programme.desc: Tyler connects with Anna Nicole Smith and reveals details only ex-boyfriend Larry Birkhead could know.

programme.title: Judge Rinder
programme.desc: Arbitration show in which real small-claims cases are adjudicated over within a studio courtroom by Judge Robert Rinder.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Lisa Rinna takes the girls on fun getaway to Lake Tahoe. The excitement only lasts so long, however, as it becomes clear that Sutton and Crystal do not see eye to eye.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A real life family feud takes place on Judge Jerry as an aunt claims she lent her nephew money to supposedly repair his car but now he won't pay her back. But the nephew insists he never borrowed any.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Guests include Quinta Brunson, Darren Criss, Taylor Dearden and musical guest Thundercat.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: As the Tahoe getaway continues, Sutton and Crystal's colorful disagreement comes to a head only to go off the rails again when Sutton feels alienated from the group.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: The gloves come off when Madison's easy beachfront sale is jeopardised by his client working with another agent.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: A countdown of the top 10 most outrageous celebrities.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Captain Lee and his returning crew Kat, Ben and Eddie have to navigate a new boat, a new location and five new faces as the nine-member crew learn to live and work together aboard the luxury yacht Ohana.

programme.title: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: After crossing the Mexican Border from Brownsville, Texas, a student out on spring break goes missing.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: Kyle apologizes to Paige, but underlying tensions continue with Craig. Jesse worries about his blossoming relationship with Lexi. Paige is surprised by Craig's concerns about her career.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The investigation into a missing mechanic sends Texas authorities on a wild goose chase that ceases at a dead end... until years later, when a new tip heats this cold case to a boil.

programme.title: Fatal Family Feuds
programme.desc: A mother is found savagely murdered in her upscale home, leaving a father and son to blame one another. Their airtight alibis lead detectives to a murder plot involving an estranged sibling.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: A countdown of the top 10 most outrageous celebrities.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Captain Lee and his returning crew Kat, Ben and Eddie have to navigate a new boat, a new location and five new faces as the nine-member crew learn to live and work together aboard the luxury yacht Ohana.

programme.desc: After crossing the Mexican Border from Brownsville, Texas, a student out on spring break goes missing.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry
programme.sub-title: The Bella Twins, Dr Paul Nassif, Metta World Peace, Tori Spelling
programme.desc: WWE Divas Brie and Nikki Bella reconnect with a long lost love, tragically killed in high school.
